name: attributes
description: The sport-agnostic EAV substrate — Attribute Sets bound to entity_type × discriminator (e.g. `athlete_enrollment` × `sport_key=football`). Ships THREE owned entities: `AttributeDefinition` (typed field: code, type IN (integer/decimal/select/boolean/date/text/slider), widget hints, validation, bilingual i18n labels), `AttributeSet` (versioned collection of definitions grouped for a host entity; selected by discriminator; ships `is_active` + `version_number` for historic-render integrity — historic assessments render with the set version that was live at capture time), `AttributeGroup` (visual grouping within a set — Primary Stats / Detailed Skills / Position / Physical Profile). Values are NOT a row-per-value table — they live in a `JSONB` column on the host entity via `spatie/laravel-schemaless-attributes` (host: `athlete_enrollments.attributes`, `progress_assessments.values`, `performance_test_results.metrics`). Ships the `HasAttributeSet` trait for hosts, the `#[AttributableEntity]` PHP attribute for discoverable entity-type registration, and the `AttributeSetResolver` + `AttributeValidator` + `AttributeRenderer` services. Filterable attributes projected via generated columns / search index as needed by consumers. Foundational for §6 (mechanism #3) sport-agnosticism — every sport variance in athlete stats / progress cards / performance batteries resolves here.

attribute_driven.description: Host modules declare their attributable entity via `#[AttributableEntity(discriminator: 'sport_key', valuesColumn: 'attributes')]` on the host model. Boot-time compiler registers the entity → discriminator column mapping into `AttributableEntityRegistry`. Runtime resolution: given a host record, look up its entity_type + discriminator value, resolve the active AttributeSet, validate + render its values.

attributes.AttributableEntity: Marks a model as an attribute-set host. `#[AttributableEntity(entityType: 'athlete_enrollment', discriminator: 'sport_key', valuesColumn: 'attributes')]`. Params: entityType (canonical string, defaults to snake_case class name), discriminator (column name on the host, e.g. `sport_key`), valuesColumn (JSONB column name where values persist — defaults to `attributes`), setResolver (optional callable name for custom resolution).

tenant.description: Tenant-facing attribute administration — define custom attributes / sets / groups, version on breaking change, activate / deactivate. Values are edited on the HOST entity's own routes (e.g. `PATCH /api/v1/athlete-enrollments/{aen}.attributes`); this module only owns definitions + validation contracts.

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant read of the attribute registry for support tooling — no PII lives here so exposure is minimal.
